schemaVersion.description: Versioned contract identifier. Change only when the data contract becomes incompatible.

contentId.description: Globally unique, stable content identifier. Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

generatedAt.description: Time the complete content document was generated.

displayTitle.description: Concise title used in the Pulse X email subject and header.

accountId.description: Stable Pulse account identifier, such as primary.

handle.description: Optional current public X handle without changing the stable accountId.

account.description: X account receiving the content options.

repository.description: GitHub repository in owner/name form containing the operator rules.

commitSha.description: Exact 40-character Git commit used to produce the content.

operator.description: Immutable provenance for the operator rules used during generation.

title.description: Concise factual title for the underlying event.

whyItMatters.description: Why the event is consequential enough to publish.

domains.description: Ordered editorial domains, with the primary domain first.

event.description: Shared event context supporting every candidate.

sourceId.description: Unique source identifier referenced by candidates.

url.description: Canonical public HTTPS page supporting the stated facts.

publishedAt.description: Source publication time when reliably available.

items.description: A traceable source used to verify the event or candidate claims.

sources.description: Verified sources. sourceId values must be unique and support candidate claims.

imageId.description: Unique image identifier referenced by candidates.

url.description: Direct public HTTPS image URL downloaded temporarily by Relay.

sourcePageUrl.description: Public HTTPS page where the image originally appears.

alt.description: Accessible description of the image content.

caption.description: Optional concise explanation of why the image matters.

sourceName.description: Organization or publisher that supplied the image.

usage.description: Whether the image is the main visual or supporting evidence.

items.description: Optional evidence or explanatory image. Images are never required to fill a quota.

images.description: Zero to two useful images. imageId values must be unique.

candidateId.description: Unique candidate identifier within this content document.

label.description: Short internal label distinguishing this candidate.

translation.description: Faithful Simplified Chinese translation of only the publishable English copy.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

sourceIds.description: Unique sourceId values from the top-level sources array. Every referenced ID must exist.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

imageIds.description: Unique imageId values from the top-level images array. Use an empty array when no image adds value.

text.description: Final publishable English X text. Must not exceed 280 characters.

oneOf.description: A standalone publishable X post candidate.

candidateId.description: Unique candidate identifier within this content document.

label.description: Short internal label distinguishing this candidate.

translation.description: Faithful Simplified Chinese translation of only the publishable English copy.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

sourceIds.description: Unique sourceId values from the top-level sources array. Every referenced ID must exist.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

imageIds.description: Unique imageId values from the top-level images array. Use an empty array when no image adds value.

kind.description: Direct reply to an existing X post.

text.description: Final publishable English X text. Must not exceed 280 characters.

url.description: Canonical HTTPS URL of the target X post.

publishedAt.description: Verified publication time of the target post.

target.description: Required target metadata for reply and quote candidates.

oneOf.description: A publishable direct reply that adds factual or analytical value.

candidateId.description: Unique candidate identifier within this content document.

label.description: Short internal label distinguishing this candidate.

translation.description: Faithful Simplified Chinese translation of only the publishable English copy.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

sourceIds.description: Unique sourceId values from the top-level sources array. Every referenced ID must exist.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

imageIds.description: Unique imageId values from the top-level images array. Use an empty array when no image adds value.

kind.description: Quote post referencing an existing X post.

text.description: Final publishable English X text. Must not exceed 280 characters.

url.description: Canonical HTTPS URL of the target X post.

publishedAt.description: Verified publication time of the target post.

target.description: Required target metadata for reply and quote candidates.

oneOf.description: A publishable quote post with a distinct value-adding perspective.

candidateId.description: Unique candidate identifier within this content document.

label.description: Short internal label distinguishing this candidate.

translation.description: Faithful Simplified Chinese translation of only the publishable English copy.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

sourceIds.description: Unique sourceId values from the top-level sources array. Every referenced ID must exist.

items.description: Stable identifier local to this content document. Use letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens.

imageIds.description: Unique imageId values from the top-level images array. Use an empty array when no image adds value.

items.description: Final publishable English X text. Must not exceed 280 characters.

posts.description: Two to twenty publishable posts in final thread order.

oneOf.description: A multi-post X thread used only when the idea cannot be expressed clearly in one post.

items.description: One complete X candidate: post, reply, quote, or thread.

candidates.description: One to three materially different, fully formed X candidates. candidateId values must be unique.

recommendation.description: Required when multiple candidates are present and omitted when only one candidate exists.

candidateId.description: Candidate recommended as the default option.

reason.description: Why this candidate is the strongest default option.

title: Pulse X Content v1
description: Complete immutable X content produced by Pulse X and delivered by Pulse Relay. All candidate sourceIds and imageIds must resolve to top-level entries.
